name: Anthropic Admin
description: Anthropic organization usage/cost metrics as PII-free aggregate governed evidence (token totals + models; opaque workspace/key ids never surfaced).

steps: An organization admin provisions an Admin API key (sk-ant-admin…) in the Claude Console (Admin role required).
Bicameral sends it as x-api-key (with anthropic-version: 2023-06-01) on GET /v1/organizations/usage_report/messages (verified 2026-06-13). Distinct from a standard API key.

runtime_config.label: Anthropic API base URL
runtime_config.description: Host the poll client pins to (anti-SSRF).

runtime_config.label: Usage bucket width
runtime_config.description: Time-bucket granularity (1m / 1h / 1d). Operator-runtime poll knob; poll <= once/min.

data.pii_posture: PII-FREE aggregate by construction. parse_usage synthesizes its OWN excerpt from numeric token totals (input = uncached + cache_read + nested cache_creation.ephemeral_*; + output) and distinct model names. The opaque workspace_id / api_key_id grouping dimensions are NEVER surfaced; there is no user email/name in the usage surface; no author field. No provider free text is emitted, so no redaction is required (the copilot/cursor PII-free-by-construction class). FX-SEC-001 hard-screens secret/PHI/PAN as the un-bypassable backstop.
data.redaction: n/a — PII-free aggregate (token totals + models only); opaque workspace/key ids never surfaced; no author; FX-SEC-001 rejects secret/PHI/PAN

instructions.text: An org admin provisions an Admin API key (sk-ant-admin…) in the Claude Console (Admin role).
Paste the Admin API key (sent as x-api-key with anthropic-version).
Test the connection: a usage poll should return one emission per time bucket (PII-free token totals + models; opaque workspace/key ids never surfaced).

wire_gates: Usage API re-verified live 2026-06-13 (docs.anthropic.com/en/api/usage-cost-api): GET /v1/organizations/usage_report/messages, x-api-key Admin key (sk-ant-admin…) + anthropic-version; response uncached_input_tokens + cache_creation (NESTED ephemeral_1h/5m) + cache_read_input_tokens + output_tokens by model/workspace/service_tier. MATCHES parse_usage incl. the nested cache_creation summation.
PII: PII-free aggregate by construction — synthesized token-totals excerpt; opaque workspace_id/api_key_id never surfaced; no author; no provider free text. FX-SEC-001 backstops secret/PHI/PAN.

The live REST poll + Admin-key resolution are operator-runtime; no live network this cycle. Live flip gated on operator review + a real usage poll with an Admin key (ADR-0012). Per-user cost (Claude Code Analytics API) is deferred behind the redaction model (per-user PII).
live_readiness: Flip-ready, NOT yet Live. Parse is built and harness-proven; the usage surface is PII-free aggregate (token totals + models). Gated on operator review + wiring the live usage poll (host-pinned to api.anthropic.com, Admin key) to a GatewaySink. To flip: provision the Admin API key; wire the runtime poll; run a real usage poll; review before promoting.
